pasteFailed.title: Clipboard Paste Failed
pasteFailed.description: Automatic paste is unavailable. You can paste manually first. Then check whether ChordVox has the required permissions in your system settings.
pasteFailed.macosDescription: Automatic paste is unavailable. You can paste manually with Cmd+V first. Fix: open System Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Accessibility and confirm ChordVox is allowed; then check Input Monitoring and make sure it is also authorized.
pasteFailed.windowsDescription: Automatic paste is unavailable. You can paste manually with Ctrl+V first. Fix: open Windows Settings and check privacy, security, or security software restrictions to make sure ChordVox is not blocked from keyboard input, clipboard access, or assistive control.
pasteFailed.linuxDescription: Automatic paste is unavailable. You can paste manually with Ctrl+V first. Fix: check your desktop environment restrictions and confirm the required auto-paste tools, such as xdotool, wtype, or ydotool, are installed and working.

standard.title: Accessibility Permissions Needed
standard.message: ChordVox needs Accessibility permissions to paste text into other applications.
standard.detail:
Current status: Clipboard copy works, but pasting (Cmd+V simulation) fails.

To fix this:
1. Open System Settings (or System Preferences on older macOS)
2. Go to Privacy & Security -> Accessibility
3. Click the lock icon and enter your password
4. Add ChordVox to the list and enable it
5. Restart ChordVox

Without this permission, dictated text will only be copied to clipboard and will not paste automatically.

stuck.title: Reset Accessibility Permissions
stuck.message: ChordVox may still be using old Accessibility permissions from a previous version.
stuck.detail:
Common issue: after rebuilding or reinstalling ChordVox, macOS can keep stale permissions that block the new app.

To fix this:
1. Open System Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Accessibility
2. Remove any old "ChordVox" entries
3. Also remove entries such as "Electron" or unclear old app names
4. Click the + button and add the current ChordVox app again
5. Make sure the checkbox is enabled
6. Restart ChordVox

Without this permission, text will only be copied to clipboard and will not paste automatically.

permissions.systemDescription: Check the core system access ChordVox needs for recording, dictation, and auto-paste.

resetAccessibility.description: This will remove ChordVox from accessibility permissions. You'll need to re-grant access in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Accessibility.
resetAccessibility.label: Reset accessibility permissions
resetAccessibility.rowDescription: Fix issues after reinstalling or rebuilding the app by removing and re-adding ChordVox in System Settings
resetAccessibility.title: Reset Accessibility Permissions

permissions.title: Permissions

privacy.cloudBackupDescription: Save your transcriptions to the cloud so you never lose them.
privacy.description: Control logging, transcription history, and analytics behavior. You can turn these off at any time.
privacy.transcriptionHistoryDescription: When disabled, ChordVox will still transcribe and paste, but won't save new history entries.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.usageAnalyticsDescription: Remote usage analytics are not enabled in this build. This switch is local-only and does not upload any transcription or performance data.

prompts.description: View, customize, and test the unified system prompt that powers text cleanup and instruction detection
prompts.requiresProDescription: Editing prompts stays free. Running AI tests can start a free 7-day Pro trial.
prompts.title: Prompt Studio

transcription.customSetupDescription: Use your own provider and API key.
transcription.description: Choose how ChordVox transcribes your voice
transcription.title: Speech to Text

switchedCloud.description: Transcription will use ChordVox's cloud service.
switchedCloud.title: Switched to ChordVox Cloud

switchedCustom.description: Configure your own provider and API key.
switchedCustom.title: Switched to Custom Setup

storageLocation.label: Model storage location
storageLocation.description: Manage streaming, Whisper, Parakeet, and SenseVoice models from one location.

streaming.currentFolderHint: Streaming models use the streaming-models subfolder under the unified model storage location.
streaming.folderAutoInstallHint: If you do not choose a folder, streaming models install to the streaming-models subfolder under the unified model storage location.

paraformerBilingual.name: Recommended (Chinese + English)
paraformerBilingual.description: Recommended default · Works for Chinese and English

toasts.downloadInProgressDescription: Please wait for the current model download to finish.
toasts.modelReadyDescription: The streaming model has been downloaded and installed.
toasts.downloadFailedDescription: Failed to download the streaming model. Please try again.
toasts.downloadCancelledDescription: The current streaming model download has been cancelled.
toasts.deleteDialogDescription: Delete "{{model}}"? You will need to download it again before using it.
toasts.deleteFailedDescription: Failed to delete the streaming model. Please try again.
toasts.clearFailedDescription: Failed to clear streaming models. Please try again.

fileTranscription.title: File Transcription
fileTranscription.description: Transcribe a single audio or video file and save the result to history. Your first file transcription can start a free 7-day Pro trial.
fileTranscription.chooseFileDescription: Pick an audio or video file to transcribe inside ChordVox.

route.label: Current Route
route.streamingDescription: File transcription follows your currently selected real-time model and will not switch itself to a high-accuracy route.
route.localDescription: File transcription follows the same local model and settings selected in the Transcription section.
route.cloudDescription: File transcription follows the same cloud provider and model selected in the Transcription section.

fileTranscription.supportedFormats: Supports common audio and video formats such as mp3, wav, m4a, mp4, mov, and webm.
fileTranscription.progressDescription: Shows the current file, overall progress, and active processing stage.

stages.idle: Transcription starts automatically after you choose a file.

fileTranscription.trialHint: Your first file transcription can start a free 7-day Pro trial.

parakeet.parakeet_tdt_0_6b_v3: Fast European-language ASR with auto language detection (25 languages, no Chinese)

cloud.gemini_gemini_3_pro_preview: Next-gen flagship model for complex reasoning

local.qwen_qwen3_8b_q4_k_m: Latest Qwen3 with thinking mode support
local.qwen_qwen3_8b_q5_k_m: Higher quality Qwen3 with thinking mode
local.qwen_qwen3_32b_q4_k_m: Most powerful local Qwen3 with deep reasoning
local.qwen_qwen2_5_0_5b_instruct_q5_k_m: Smallest model, fast but limited capabilities
local.qwen_qwen2_5_1_5b_instruct_q5_k_m: Small model, good for basic tasks
local.openai_oss_gpt_oss_20b_mxfp4: OpenAI's open-weight model for consumer hardware

realTime.label: Real-time Transcription
realTime.cardDescription: Talk & see text instantly · Local · Low latency · Private
realTime.switchedDescription: Talk and see text appear instantly with local, low-latency processing
realTime.clearModelsDescription: Delete all downloaded real-time transcription models? You will need to download them again.
realTime.clearedModelsDescription: All downloaded real-time transcription models have been removed.
realTime.downloadHint: Download a local model before using real-time transcription.
realTime.defaultEnabledTitle: Real-time transcription is enabled by default
realTime.defaultEnabledDescription: Hotkey dictation will use local real-time transcription by default. The default model is "{{defaultModelName}}". You can configure high-accuracy transcription below if needed.

highAccuracy.label: High-Accuracy Transcription
highAccuracy.cardDescription: Transcribe after recording for higher accuracy, but slower · Cloud API or local models
highAccuracy.switchedDescription: Transcribe after recording for higher accuracy, but slower
highAccuracy.onboardingDescription: Best for long-form dictation and meetings: higher accuracy, but slower, with cloud API or local model options.
